context: Tests whether the Mermaid diagrams skill helps an agent complete the sequence-login-handshake scenario while following diagram type, syntax, semantic, renderer, safety, and claim-discipline guidance relevant to the task.

checklist.name: Uses sequence diagram syntax
checklist.description: Uses Mermaid sequenceDiagram syntax rather than a flowchart, class diagram, or ER diagram.

checklist.name: Includes all participants
checklist.description: Includes Browser, WebApp, AuthService, and UserStore as participants or clearly equivalent actor names.

checklist.name: Orders the happy path correctly
checklist.description: Shows credentials sent from Browser to WebApp, verification through AuthService and UserStore, and a successful dashboard/session response.

checklist.name: Models failure branch
checklist.description: Uses an alt/else-style branch for valid versus invalid credentials and returns an error on the invalid path.

checklist.name: Explains type choice briefly
checklist.description: Includes one concise sentence explaining that the diagram fits ordered interactions over time.
